temporal.note: Temporal clustering or duplicate timestamps may indicate batching/latency issues.

semantic.note: Events without canonical mapping or with mismatches indicate semantic gaps.

structural.note: Hash chain integrity issues indicate structural anomalies.

recovery.note: Recovery gap indicates the system did not attempt to mitigate failures.
